title: Ellie's Vanilla Plushes
description: A simple fabric mod for 1.20.1 that adds lil plushies of vanilla mobs
body:
Want cute cuddly plushies of your favorite vanilla mobs? This mod is for you!!

This simple lil guy adds a plushy item for you to craft of many vanilla mobs! Use the plushy base  (crafted with 8 wool and a redstone dust) and different colors of wool to craft these cute lil fellas.


Need a server? Kinetic Hosting has got you covered! Starting at just $1/GB a month, you can set up a modded server in mere moments!
[Get 25% off your first month by clicking this link and using code "QueenEllie" at checkout!!](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=400)

![Kinetic Hosting Advertising Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9961251a2cf20585810fce119d8726056d7dcecb_0.webp)

JEI is recommended but not required. Crafting recipes are based on the colors of each mob.


Project is NOT abandoned, I just work full time and havent had the time/energy to continue working. As of January 2026, work has resumed :D Keep in mind that this is just a fun little personal project that I decided to put on Modrinth :) I have very little coding knowledge, and I am learning as I go. And yes, I am well aware that this isn't exactly an original idea, but again, it is just for fun. 

Want to leave feedback? Open an issue on the [Github](https://github.com/QueenEllivair/ElliesVanillaPlushies)!! I'll respond to comments and try to implement suggestions as often as I can :D
